name: Passive Aggressive
description: Oh, you're too busy for water? Must be nice.
messages: Oh, you're too busy for water? Must be nice. 💅
No worries, your kidneys can wait. They love that.
I'm not saying you should drink water but… you should.
Remember water? That thing you keep ignoring? 💧
Sure, skip this. It's only your health. 💁
Bold of you to think dehydration is a vibe 🙃
Water called. It said you've been distant. 📞
Don't drink water. See what happens. 🤷
Your skin cells would like a word. 💅
Oh you're hydrating tomorrow? That's adorable.
I'll just wait here. With this water. Alone. 💧
Per my last email: drink some water. 📧
Not drinking water is certainly… a choice. 🙃
Your brain is 73% water. Treat it better. 🧠
Wow, another notification ignored. Shocked. 💅
The water isn't going to drink itself. Just saying.
Cool, cool. Dehydration is a look, I guess. 💁
You know what's expensive? Kidney stones. Just saying. 💰
Anyway, drink water. Or don't. I'm a notification. 🤷
This is fine. Everything is fine. 🔥💧
